title: Present Simple Tense
description: Learn when and how to use the present simple tense

exercises.question: She ___ to school every day.
exercises.explanation: We use 'goes' for he/she/it in present simple. Add -es to verbs ending in -o.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para he/she/it, adicionamos -s ou -es ao verbo.

exercises.question: They ___ (not/like) coffee.
exercises.explanation: Use 'don't' + base verb for negatives with I/you/we/they.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Use 'don't' + verbo na forma base para frases negativas com I/you/we/they.

exercises.question: ___ he play football on weekends?
exercises.explanation: Use 'Does' for questions with he/she/it in present simple.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para perguntas com he/she/it, usamos 'Does' no início.

exercises.explanation: These are common daily routine phrases using present simple.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Essas são frases comuns sobre rotina diária.

exercises.question: My mother ___ (work) at a hospital.
exercises.explanation: For he/she/it, add -s to the base verb: work → works.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para he/she/it, adicione -s ao verbo: work → works.
